APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award

Be recognised.
Save lives.

Identifying, recognising and celebrating hospitals across Asia Pacific that demonstrate excellence in environmental hygiene and patient safety.

Apply Now Learn more →
About AEHEA

About APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award

The award is scientifically led and independently governed by APSIC, and delivered in cooperation with Schülke. It recognises hospitals that demonstrate excellence in environmental hygiene and patient safety across the Asia Pacific region.

✓

Commitment to IPC

Demonstrating unwavering dedication to infection prevention and control practices across all departments and clinical settings.

⚡

Innovative practices

Leading institutions develop and implement novel evidence-based interventions that advance environmental hygiene standards.

★

Quality of care

Excellence in environmental hygiene directly translates to measurable improvements in patient safety and clinical outcomes.

Leadership

Message from Award Program Chair and APSIC President

"The APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award celebrates healthcare institutions that demonstrate exceptional leadership and measurable success in maintaining safe environments. It is a critical step toward safeguarding patient lives."

A/Prof. Moi Lin Ling
Program Chair, AEHEA

"One of the core components in the infection prevention and control program is appropriate environmental hygiene practices and protocols. Together, we can facilitate practices related to the prevention and control of healthcare associated infections."

Prof. Anucha Apisarnthanarak
President, APSIC
Why Join

Why Join the APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award?

01

Be Recognised

Showcase your institution's leadership and excellence in environmental hygiene across the Asia Pacific region. Gain regional recognition, peer credibility, and valuable networking opportunities.

02

Save Lives

Implementing exemplary environmental hygiene strategies significantly reduces patient mortality and morbidity. Drive higher standards and improve patient safety outcomes.

Celebrated on the regional stage

Award recipients are formally recognised at an upcoming APSIC Congress, giving your programme visibility among regional IPC leaders.

Prestigious recognition, not a monetary prize

Finalist institutions are honoured with a visit from an independent panel of experts and a certificate of recognition that strengthens your programme long after the award.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Hospitals and healthcare institutions across the Asia Pacific region are eligible to apply. Participation is open to institutions at various stages of environmental hygiene development.
Participation in the Award Programme is generally not associated with a monetary prize or participation fee. Any specific requirements will be communicated during the registration phase.
Submissions will be assessed based on commitment to infection prevention and environmental hygiene practices, innovation and sustainability, impact on patient safety and infection prevention.
Winners receive formal recognition at APSIC events, exposure across APSIC regional networks, and a structured scoring report with expert feedback on their environmental hygiene programme.
Dates for the upcoming cycle will be published on this website and communicated to registered stakeholders. Subscribe below to receive updates as soon as they are available.
Yes. All submissions will be handled with strict confidentiality and used solely for evaluation purposes within the programme.

Want to stay informed?

Get updates on the AEHEA award programme.

AEHEA

Asia Pacific recognition for environmental hygiene excellence, infection prevention and quality patient care.
